summary: P3-T11 tier wiring to P2 sandbox profiles — the grant's sandbox_tier selects the confinement backend (community->gVisor/runsc, core/verified->bwrap) as a MONOTONE floor over the operator --backend, enforced at the grant via exod.run_step; a perk's declared tier flows from perks.json through govd into the grant and the discovery catalog; the community no-secrets floor holds at schema + runtime
